answers.answer:
#!/bin/bash

set -euo pipefail

# Colors
function color_echo() {
  local color=$1
  shift
  case $color in
    red) echo -e "\\e[31m$*\\e[0m" ;;
    green) echo -e "\\e[32m$*\\e[0m" ;;
    yellow) echo -e "\\e[33m$*\\e[0m" ;;
    blue) echo -e "\\e[34m$*\\e[0m" ;;
    *) echo "$*" ;;
  esac
}

success() { color_echo green " ✓ $1"; }
error() { color_echo red " ✗ $1"; exit 1; }
warning() { color_echo yellow " ⚠ $1"; }
section() { color_echo blue "=== $1 ==="; }

VERBOSE=${VERBOSE:-false}
SKIP_INTEGRATION=${SKIP_INTEGRATION:-false}

while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do
  case $1 in
    --verbose) VERBOSE=true; shift ;;
    --skip-integration) SKIP_INTEGRATION=true; shift ;;
    *) echo "Unknown option: $1"; exit 1 ;;
  esac
done

passed=0
total_checks=0

check() {
  total_checks=$((total_checks + 1))
  if "$@"; then
    success "$1 passed"
    passed=$((passed + 1))
  else
    error "$1 failed"
  fi
}

section "1. Environment Checks"

# Env vars
if [[ -f .env.example ]]; then
  missing_vars=()
  while IFS='=' read -r key _; do
    [[ $key =~ ^[[:space:]]*# ]] && continue  # skip comments
    [[ -z $key ]] && continue
    [[ -n "${!key:-}" ]] || missing_vars+=("$key")
  done < .env.example
  [[ ${#missing_vars[@]} -eq 0 ]] || error "Missing env vars: ${missing_vars[*]}"
  success "All env vars set"
else
  warning ".env.example not found"
fi

# Node version
if [[ -f .nvmrc ]]; then
  required=$(<.nvmrc | tr -dc '0-9.')
  current=$(node -v | tr -dc '0-9.' | cut -d. -f1-2)
  [[ "$current" == "$required"* ]] || error "Node mismatch: $current vs $required"
  success "Node version OK"
fi

# Disk
avail=$(df . | awk 'NR==2{print $4}')
[[ $avail -gt 1048576 ]] || error "Disk <1GB ($avail KB)"
  success "Disk OK"

# Memory
mem_avail=$(free | awk '/Mem:/ {print $7}')
[[ $mem_avail -gt 524288 ]] || error "Mem <512MB ($mem_avail KB)"
success "Memory OK"

section "2. Code Quality"

check "npm run lint" "Lint"
check "npx tsc --noEmit" "Type check"

# TODO/FIXME
git fetch origin main 2>/dev/null || git fetch origin master 2>/dev/null
git diff --name-only origin/main | xargs -r grep -li 'todo|fixme' && error "TODO/FIXME in changes" || success "No TODO/FIXME"

section "3. Tests"

check "npm test" "Unit tests"

if [[ $SKIP_INTEGRATION == false ]]; then
  check "npm run test:integration" "Integration tests"
else
  warning "Skipping integration"
fi

# Coverage - simplistic
grep -r 'coverage' coverage/lcov-report/index.html || coverage=0
if [[ $coverage -lt 80 ]]; then error "Coverage $coverage% <80%"; else success "Coverage OK"; fi

section "4. Security"

npm audit --audit-level=high | grep -q 'found' && error "npm audit failed" || success "npm audit OK"

# Secrets (basic)
grep -rIl 'key\s*=|pass\w*\s*=|secret\s*=' src/ | grep -v -E '(test|example|dummy)' && error "Potential secrets" || success "No secrets"

# .env
grep -q '^\.env' .gitignore 2>/dev/null || error ".env not gitignored"
success ".env safe"

section "5. Build"

rm -rf dist build .next
check "npm run build" "Build"

[[ -d dist || -d build || -d .next ]] || error "No build output"
success "Build OK"

section "6. Database"

if command -v npx >/dev/null && grep -q prisma package.json; then
  pending=$(npx prisma migrate status 2>/dev/null | grep Pending | wc -l)
  [[ $pending -eq 0 ]] || error "$pending pending migrations"
  success "Migrations OK"

  # Sequential
  ls prisma/migrations/ 2>/dev/null | sort | nl | awk '{print $1":"$2}' | paste -sd'\n' | grep -v '^1:' && error "Migration gap" || true
  success "Migrations sequential"
else
  warning "No Prisma"
fi

section "Summary"
if [[ $passed == $total_checks ]]; then
  success "ALL PASS ($passed/$total_checks). Deploy!"
  exit 0
else
  error "FAILED ($passed/$total_checks)"
  exit 1
fi
